action.reasoning: Observation: Exploration script ran but crashed on a zero-size array. I can see obs keys/shapes. Key sensor is agent_0_goal_to_agent_gps_compass (dist, angle). Analysis: I need a heuristic controller that turns toward the human and approaches to 1-2m distance, then follows. Literature shows heuristic experts outperform RL. Decision: Build heuristic controller + predict.py, create dummy checkpoint, submit eval immediately to measure runtime.
